semantics: The private agent handle maps to one live ZJS inspector session and never broadcasts across sessions.
LifecycleReporter and TestReporter events are suppressed until their respective domains are enabled.
Disabling LifecycleReporter also clears its prevent-exit state; session release clears every agent state.
LifecycleReporter.error projects message, name, source URLs, one-based line/column pairs, and source lines atomically.
Invalid, dead, or allocation-failing BunString payloads produce no partial inspector event.
TestReporter TestType values 0 and 1 map to test and describe; every other value is rejected without an event.
TestReporter TestStatus values 0 through 5 map in pinned protocol order; every other value is rejected without an event.
Found-with-location preserves the supplied URL and line and includes parentId only when it is positive.
Found-from-frame uses the first active public caller location, emits a source URL or script ID when available, and omits absent optional fields.
Agent handles are validated against the live session registry before dereference, so arbitrary and detached pointers are inert.
Each call retains its session across the frontend callback, allowing callback-driven release without use-after-free.
The Home and Bun profile libraries compile, link, and run the same external consumer against all eight exports.
